2952614.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2952614.description: Dave is concerned that The Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. But when they challenge Dave to play the game before judging it, Dave becomes even more addicted than The Chipmunks.

2952636.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2952636.description: Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him the skateboard he's always wanted. But, Theodore gets sidetracked by his sweet tooth and squanders all of Alvin's money on candy instead. Now Theodore is forced to make up an improbable story.

2973907.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2973907.description: In a rare moment of generosity, Alvin gives his beloved cap to a fan. But soon he's convinced his mojo was in his cap, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert.

2973926.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2973926.description: During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for a real Tasmanian devil. The mixup creates problems all around, especially when Simon reads that the Tasmanian devil is scheduled for surgery. Can Dave and the boys rescue Alvin?!

2975769.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2975769.description: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's, missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. And the only way to break the curse is to find Mister Whiskers.

2975799.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2975799.description: When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty. But he quickly learns that parenting is a lot harder than he ever imagined.

2975834.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2975834.description: Dave is concerned that The Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. But when they challenge Dave to play the game before judging it, Dave becomes even more addicted than The Chipmunks.

2975911.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2975911.description: Wanneer Alvin denkt dat Theodore's teddybeer helderziend is, wil hij plotseling vriendjes worden met Happy Teddy. // Alvin verzint een feestdag om Theodore zijn klusjes te laten doen.

2984062.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2984062.description: Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him the skateboard he's always wanted. But, Theodore gets sidetracked by his sweet tooth and squanders all of Alvin's money on candy instead. Now Theodore is forced to make up an improbable story.

2984113.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2984113.description: In a rare moment of generosity, Alvin gives his beloved cap to a fan. But soon he's convinced his mojo was in his cap, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert.

2987602.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2987602.description: Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him the skateboard he's always wanted. But, Theodore gets sidetracked by his sweet tooth and squanders all of Alvin's money on candy instead. Now Theodore is forced to make up an improbable story.

2987633.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2987633.description: In a rare moment of generosity, Alvin gives his beloved cap to a fan. But soon he's convinced his mojo was in his cap, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert.

2987680.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2987680.description: During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for a real Tasmanian devil. The mixup creates problems all around, especially when Simon reads that the Tasmanian devil is scheduled for surgery. Can Dave and the boys rescue Alvin?!

2987771.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2987771.description: De stad wordt aangevallen wanneer Simon een drone maakt die niet alleen pizza's bezorgt, maar ook kan leren. // Alvin vreest dat de Chipmunks Dave saai hebben gemaakt, wanneer hij ontdekt dat hij een rockster had kunnen zijn.

3003954.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3003954.description: During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for a real Tasmanian devil. The mixup creates problems all around, especially when Simon reads that the Tasmanian devil is scheduled for surgery. Can Dave and the boys rescue Alvin?!

3004008.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3004008.description: Dave can't help but notice that his Chipmunks are growing up and becoming independent. Anxious to spend more time with them, he only ends up suffocating them. In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend.

3016700.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3016700.description: Dave can't help but notice that his Chipmunks are growing up and becoming independent. Anxious to spend more time with them, he only ends up suffocating them. In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend.

3016724.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3016724.description: While Dave is working on an important new song, the Chipmunks are upstairs making a mess of their bedroom. Dave orders them to clean their room. But in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song. Can they fix it in time for the big performance?

3016766.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3016766.description: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him an exact replica of the car. Will Alvin be able to keep this secret from Dave? Or will it turn out that the toy car is TOO FAST - TOO FURIOUS?!

3023612.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023612.description: While Dave is working on an important new song, the Chipmunks are upstairs making a mess of their bedroom. Dave orders them to clean their room. But in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song. Can they fix it in time for the big performance?

3023652.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023652.description: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him an exact replica of the car. Will Alvin be able to keep this secret from Dave? Or will it turn out that the toy car is TOO FAST - TOO FURIOUS?!

3023679.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023679.description: Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the beautiful Princess of England! Problem is, he has to convince Brittany he's worthy.

3030197.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3030197.description: Alvin is convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move into their home and tries a variety of ways to stop the invasion.

3030234.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3030234.description: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. So, they decide to rewire the bear's hard drive, so the bear will follow their directions! But when Alvin abuses the privilege, Simon turns the tables on him.

3038303.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3038303.description: Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the beautiful Princess of England! Problem is, he has to convince Brittany he's worthy.

3038336.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3038336.description: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they saved the tree from being cut down, and made it their home.

3038367.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3038367.description: Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to thwart his departure and keep him at home.

3044889.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3044889.description: Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to thwart his departure and keep him at home.

3044928.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3044928.description: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Talk about the Odd Couple.

3044955.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3044955.description: Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. He's smart, funny, and shares Simon's love of Science. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon to get in with the cool crowd. Can the brothers survive this new friend?

3050614.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3050614.description: Just like every year, Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school. That is until he sees the new Principal and then it's whoa! Love at first sight!

3050652.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3050652.description: When Theodore disappears from his bed, leaving a blob of sticky, green slime behind, Alvin is POSITIVE that he has been kidnapped by aliens!With the help of Simon and his home-made high-tech gear, they are ready to fight the aliens and save their brother.

3010038.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3010038.description: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him an exact replica of the car. Will Alvin be able to keep this secret from Dave? Or will it turn out that the toy car is TOO FAST - TOO FURIOUS?!

3010052.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3010052.description: Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the beautiful Princess of England! Problem is, he has to convince Brittany he's worthy.

3010705.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3010705.description: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Talk about the Odd Couple.

3010723.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3010723.description: Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. He's smart, funny, and shares Simon's love of Science. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon to get in with the cool crowd. Can the brothers survive this new friend?

3010749.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3010749.description: After squabbling with his brothers, Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room, but soon realizes living alone isn't what it's cracked up to be.

3063338.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3063338.description: When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in a roundup of shopping carts where the first prize is a new bike.

3063360.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3063360.description: The Chipmunks and Chipettes try to reduce their carbon footprint when Jeanette signs them up for a Green Living competition.

3063402.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3063402.description: Alvin is so taken with a girl at school, that he agrees to look after her talking Mina bird. But when Alvin says something damaging, he worries the bird will repeat it to the girl and must find a way to keep the bird from blabbing.

3069329.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3069329.description: It's Jeanette's birthday but she doesn't want to celebrate it, since she no longer believes in the magic of this special day. So the Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer her a magical, fairy-tale birthday she will ever forget.

3069935.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3069935.description: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers! Alvin panics! Their 'bro zone' has been invaded!

3018891.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3018891.description: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they saved the tree from being cut down, and made it their home.

3018915.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3018915.description: Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to thwart his departure and keep him at home.

3019832.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3019832.description: When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in a roundup of shopping carts where the first prize is a new bike.

3019855.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3019855.description: The Chipmunks and Chipettes try to reduce their carbon footprint when Jeanette signs them up for a Green Living competition.

3019896.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3019896.description: Alvin is so taken with a girl at school, that he agrees to look after her talking Mina bird. But when Alvin says something damaging, he worries the bird will repeat it to the girl and must find a way to keep the bird from blabbing.

3023022.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023022.description: Brittany is humiliated by Jeanette's lack of style. That is, until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's style icon. Now Brittany wants to prove she's more stylish than her sister.

3023318.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023318.description: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities.

3023341.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023341.description: Anxious to give Dave a much-needed rest, Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap. Problem is, the house guests show up early while Dave is still home.

3026396.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3026396.description: When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit! Soon Theodore, (now Lil T), is offered a solo career and has to decide between family and fame as a solo artist.

3026421.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3026421.description: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. So, with the help of Theodore and a VERY reluctant Simon, Alvin sets about proving it.

3028232.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3028232.description: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Talk about the Odd Couple.

3028259.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3028259.description: Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. He's smart, funny, and shares Simon's love of Science. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon to get in with the cool crowd. Can the brothers survive this new friend?

3093891.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3093891.description: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him to leave the crime fighting to the professionals.

3093923.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3093923.description: Brittany is humiliated by Jeanette's lack of style. That is, until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's style icon. Now Brittany wants to prove she's more stylish than her sister.

3093956.description: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities.

2987878.description: After squabbling with his brothers, Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room, but soon realizes living alone isn't what it's cracked up to be.

2987902.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2987902.description: When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in a roundup of shopping carts where the first prize is a new bike.

2989792.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2989792.description: Anxious to give Dave a much-needed rest, Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap. Problem is, the house guests show up early while Dave is still home.

2989820.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2989820.description: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant.

2989861.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2989861.description: All the kids at school are obsessed with their virtual dogs on their smart phones. But when all the phones wind up missing, Alvin is blamed for the theft and has to follow the clues to find the real culprit and clear his name.

2989929.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2989929.description: Wanneer de teddybeer van Theodore, 'Talking Teddy', wordt gestolen, moeten de jongens met Agent Dingmans samenwerken // Wanneer Alvin de krant begint te stelen om te verkopen op school, geeft Dave de krantenjongen de schuld en weigert hem te betalen.

3085830.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3085830.description: While Dave is working on an important new song, the Chipmunks are upstairs making a mess of their bedroom. Dave orders them to clean their room. But in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song. Can they fix it in time for the big performance?

3041427.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3041427.description: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him an exact replica of the car. Will Alvin be able to keep this secret from Dave? Or will it turn out that the toy car is TOO FAST - TOO FURIOUS?!

2994608.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2994608.description: Desperate to avenge last year's humiliating loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory.

2995277.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2995277.description: Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one himself. Just one problem, Alvin has to film Dave without him knowing.

2995310.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2995310.description: It's the big Bake-Off, and Eleanor has prepared her signature cake and left it out to cool. But Brittany and Alvin come home, and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Can they re-make the cake in time? Or will Eleanor's dreams be reduced to crumbs

2995373.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2995373.description: Alvin wedt met Bocarter dat er buitenaards leven bestaat, en moet het binnen een week bewijzen, anders staat hij voor schut. // Brittany is woedend wanneer ze denkt dat Alvin op haar blog geschreven heeft en wil wraak nemen, maar was Alvin het wel?

3003299.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3003299.description: Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the beautiful Princess of England! Problem is, he has to convince Brittany he's worthy.

3003349.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3003349.description: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they saved the tree from being cut down, and made it their home.

3016346.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3016346.description: In order to get Theodore to do his bidding, Alvin tells Theodore that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy. When Derek steals Theodore's candy, Theodore tells Derek that Alvin will get him back using his secret powers. Now Alvin has to come

3016365.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3016365.description: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Is playing dirty the only way to win?

3017140.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3017140.description: Hoping to impress her fashion idol, Brittany takes up painting. But her idol only likes her art after Alvin accidentally ruins it. Now Brittany thinks she's an artist ready for a big exhibition.

3021206.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3021206.description: Als Theodore een allergische reactie krijgt, wordt hij gelijk op een suikervrij dieet gezet. Maar komt het wel van de suiker? // De Chipmunks krijgen vrij, omdat juf Smith vindt dat de ouders maar eens moeten merken hoe zwaar lesgeven eigenlijk is.

3022270.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3022270.description: In order to get Theodore to do his bidding, Alvin tells Theodore that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy. When Derek steals Theodore's candy, Theodore tells Derek that Alvin will get him back using his secret powers. Now Alvin has to come

3023068.description: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Is playing dirty the only way to win?

3023088.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023088.description: Hoping to impress her fashion idol, Brittany takes up painting. But her idol only likes her art after Alvin accidentally ruins it. Now Brittany thinks she's an artist ready for a big exhibition.

3037914.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3037914.description: When Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's favorite new bag, he must come up with a way to replace this "one of a kind" fashion piece. Many failures later, Alvin is forced to do something his reputation may never recover from.

3037934.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3037934.description: When The Chipmunks find a baby bird that's fallen from its nest, Alvin is initially reluctant to get too attached. But the little bird soon worms his way into Alvin's hat...and heart, creating an unlikely friendship.

3038674.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3038674.description: Alvin is convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move into their home and tries a variety of ways to stop the invasion.

3042811.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3042811.description: Als Dave een weekendje van huis is, dansen niet de Chipmunks, maar een groepje ongenode gasten van school op tafel. // Theodore wordt getroffen door de bliksem en identificeert zich daarna met Electroboy, de superheld uit een stripverhaal.

3044285.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3044285.description: When The Chipmunks find a baby bird that's fallen from its nest, Alvin is initially reluctant to get too attached. But the little bird soon worms his way into Alvin's hat...and heart, creating an unlikely friendship.

3049735.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3049735.description: Simon is elected as the school's safety monitor and gets to choose the destination of the family vacation. But when Alvin goofs off at school, he has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention and ruining the family vacation.

3049771.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3049771.description: Fed up with seeing how dependent The Chipmunks have become on their technology, Dave decides to take them camping for a weekend, without electricity, cell service or the Internet.

3055500.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3055500.description: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him to leave the crime fighting to the professionals.

3061062.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3061062.description: Ondanks alle spelregels die ze bedenken, blijkt het spel Mega Bikkelbal toch gevaarlijker dan de broertjes hadden gedacht. / Niemand leest de schoolkrant, tot er opeens foto's verschijnen die nogal gênant zijn voor de pestkoppen van de school.

3064698.description: When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit! Soon Theodore, (now Lil T), is offered a solo career and has to decide between family and fame as a solo artist.

3068669.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3068669.description: Theodore is desperate to land the part of the monster in a play, so Alvin decides to show Theodore how to really scare people. But Alvin scares him so badly, that poor Theodore freezes like a statue. Can Alvin unfreeze Theodore before the big audition?

3068711.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3068711.description: When an accident forces Simon to wear his embarrassing old glasses, he becomes the target of the school bully. Unwilling to remain a victim, Simon builds a homemade robot body-guard, that helps Simon stand up to the bullies.

3075730.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3075730.description: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities.

3082068.description: Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave because he has tickets to the big soccer match.

3082089.description: When Dave gets a parenting APP to help supervise The Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control.

3083606.description: Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave because he has tickets to the big soccer match.

3086755.description: Jeanette wants to give a toast to Brittany at her party. But Jeanette is so shy, she seeks advice from the most confident person she knows ALVIN. But his advice embarrasses Brittany to the point where she decides not to invite Jeanette to her party.

3086796.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3086796.description: Needing to find a part time job in order to buy the latest video game, Alvin decides to 'borrow' Brittany's baby-sitting job. But Basil is not too thrilled at having Alvin look after him. So he decides to put Alvin through the wringer!
